## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` produces clean output
- [ ] If touching `src/generated/`, regenerated rather than hand-edited
- [ ] If adding a hand-rolled namespace, updated `src/client.ts` and `src/generated/README.md`
- [ ] Public types exported from `src/types.ts` (no `as any`)
- [ ] README / `docs/` updated if behavior or surface changed
